subcodes.first_line: O Jinab-i-Asadu'llah! Several letters from thee have been received, and this is the second letter being sent in reply. Owing to lack of time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب اسد خدا چند نامه از شما رسید و این نامه ثانیست که ارسال میگردد عدم وقت و
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
